positive: A vibrant, retro-futuristic cityscape bathed in neon magenta and cyan hues, featuring stylized palm trees, a glowing grid floor, and a setting sun viewed through a prism. Synthwave aesthetic, vaporwave style, 1980s Miami vibe, vector art, high contrast, perfect for a t-shirt print.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, muddy colors, grainy, dirty, messy lines
